author: nomarcub
description: Ribbon button and command to open vault as a Visual Studio Code (VSCode) workspace.

manifest.author: NomarCub
manifest.description: Open the vault as a Visual Studio Code (VS Code / VSCode) workspace with a ribbon button, a command or a file explorer context menu.
manifest.name: Open vault in VS Code

name: Open vault in VS Code

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- internal changes, see: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/pull/28, https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/pull/30
  - remove dev property and hot reload plugin support

update readme with official Obsidian Community site link: [Obsidian Plugins - Open vault in VS Code](https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/open-vscode)



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/compare/1.4.2...1.4.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- Revise README in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/pull/27
  - add "Prerequisites" section to readme with command line path info from previous issues
  - add pointer to readme in plugin settings
  - fix logging, add more error info, including mentioning settings

## New Contributors
- @royemosby made their first contribution in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/pull/27

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/compare/1.4.1...1.4.2

releases.author: NomarCub
releases.description:
new `urlProtocol` setting: `You can override the default vscode:// to VSCode Insiders, VSCodium or other VSCode variants' protocol string`
- replaces old `useUrlInsiders` option for activating url for VSCode Insiders
- see https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/pull/22, https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/issues/21, [readme section](https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode?tab=readme-ov-file#settings-for-open-vscode-via-url)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: NomarCub
releases.description:
add `{{folderpath}}` template variable, closes https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/issues/8

minor changes:
- fix hot-reload plugin console error, close https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/issues/10
- use non-resized svg, as custom viewboxes are now supported: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/366#issuecomment-1315729045
- bump dependencies
- copy build system changes from obsidian-sample-plugin
- update funding with Ko-fi and Obsidian manifest
- update community plugins link in README, close https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/issues/9


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-open-vscode/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2
